originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&n` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= CONFIG_LOCKDEP true)
     (= CONFIG_SLOB false)
     (= CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES false)
     (= CONFIG_SLAB true)
     (= CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER false))
model:
(define-fun CONFIG_SLAB () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_SLOB () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_PPC_256K_PAGES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun CONFIG_LOCKDEP () Bool
  true)
(define-fun CONFIG_FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER () Bool
  false)
reasoning: Line 41 (reported as L39): `int n = *cache` inside init_node_lock_keys() (LOCKDEP=T). n assigned but never read — dead store. SLOB=F ensures kmalloc_caches is declared. No '// ERROR' at L41 → new bug not in VBDB. Required: LOCKDEP=T AND SLOB=F. PC adds FORCE_MAX_ZONEORDER=F, PPC_256K_PAGES=F, SLAB=T — only affect array bounds, not dead store. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
